title: philotria minor
intro: Philotria minor, also known as the Lesser Philotria, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Annonaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Philotria minor include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves are often dried and made into capsules or powders for oral consumption.
